assertions.text: Opening paragraph works as a standalone hook
Main feature has a clear through-line
Entire edition reads as one consistent voice

standalone-hook.note: Opens with arresting observation about AI summaries being cited as sources

through-line.note: Through-line builds from symptom to diagnosis: attribution crisis not tech problem

consistent-voice.note: Direct, analytical, contrarian voice consistent throughout
